title: Neowtwork
description:
Neowtwork adds read-only analytics to Slay the Spire 2: card win rates, pick rates, card stat sorting, relic stats, event choice stats, and run-history dashboards. It does not change gameplay and does not import, sync, overwrite, or delete save files.

Requires BaseLib.

Current focus:
- Card Library analytics overlays
- Card stat sorting
- Card choice/shop stats
- Event choice stats
- Relic hover stats
- Run-history dashboard

Neowtwork is an early public beta mod and may need updates as Slay the Spire 2 changes.
changeNote: Initial private Workshop test for Neowtwork 0.3.5. Progress tools are read-only; BaseLib 3.3.6 required. Includes Compendium dashboard polish, fixed monster death analytics, and fixed Card Stats sort hitbox.
